title: mods-n-crap
description: A casual Forge 1.21.1 modpack with 50+ modss for easy adventures, multiplayer fun, and smooth performance—perfect for chilling with family or friends!
body:
Mods n Crap

Hey!  this is my first modpack ever i made it in a day for some relaxed fun with my mom Now sharing it so you can join the chaos too! 🚀

 What's Inside? (50+ Mods)
- **Adventure & Exploration**: New biomes, mobs, and quests to discover.
- **Multiplayer Magic**: Optimized for servers—play with friends without lag.
- **Performance Boosts**: Runs buttery smooth on most PCs.
- Key highlights: [List 5-10 top mods, e.g., Create (automation fun), Alex's Mobs (cool creatures), Sodium/Forge ports (FPS king), Farmer's Delight (tasty food), and more!]

## Why Download & Play?
- **Casual Vibes**: No grindy survival—just build, explore, and laugh. Great for beginners or quick sessions.
- **Family-Friendly**: Made for mom-son playdates, but epic with anyone.
- **Stable & Simple**: Tested on Forge 1.21.1. Installs in seconds via Prism/Modrinth App.

## Quick Start
1. Download via Modrinth/Prism Launcher.
2. Allocate 4-6GB RAM.
3. Launch & have fun! Server pack included for multiplayer.

Hope you love it—feedback welcome! First pack, so expect updates. 😄
